name: West Red Lake Gold Mines Ltd.
description: West Red Lake Gold Mines Ltd. is a publicly traded gold company focused on its flagship Madsen Mine in the Red Lake Gold District of Ontario, Canada. The company acquired the Madsen Mine in 2023 and has since focused on developing reliable resource modeling, mine engineering, and infrastructure to support efficient operations. With production ramping up, the company aims to expand its output by developing the nearby Rowan deposit as a satellite mine. West Red Lake Gold continues to explore its 47-square-kilometer land package, which remains under-explored and holds significant potential for further gold discoveries.
